target_profile: Frontend engineer seeking English-friendly frontend roles in Japan
search_scope: Current Japan frontend openings verified on 2026-04-04
methodology: Reviewed live listing pages and normalized them into a shortlist.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer, Money Forward Cloud, Fukuoka
jobs.tech_stack: React, TypeScript, Next.js, Redux, Apollo Client, GraphQL, Jest
jobs.summary: Lead frontend architecture and modernization work for Money Forward Cloud products, with a strong focus on React, Next.js, accessibility, and large-scale business UI development.
jobs.notes: Strongest senior frontend match in this sample due to modern stack, clear compensation, and explicit frontend architecture ownership. Verified open on 2026-04-04.

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer, Money Forward Cloud, Fukuoka
jobs.tech_stack: React, TypeScript, Next.js, Redux, Apollo Client, GraphQL
jobs.summary: Frontend-focused role on Money Forward Cloud products, covering user-facing quality, performance, accessibility, and modernization in a growing engineering base.
jobs.notes: Very good mid-level frontend fit with visible salary band and English-friendly environment. Verified open on 2026-04-04.

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer
jobs.summary: Develop and operate web products including securities mini-apps, PC trading sites, and internal business tools in a new frontend organization.
jobs.notes: Excellent remote-in-Japan flexibility and clear frontend scope, but compensation and visa details were not stated. Verified open on 2026-04-04.

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer - Visualization Systems
jobs.tech_stack: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Three.js, React Three Fiber, WebGL, Redux, Storybook
jobs.summary: Build high-quality visualization dashboards and UI systems for robotics products, with ownership over frontend architecture, UX quality, and real-time data interfaces.
jobs.notes: High-signal frontend role for candidates interested in data visualization or robotics UI. Japan residency is required. Verified open on 2026-04-04.

jobs.title: Global Internship Program - Front end
jobs.salary: Unpaid internship with subsidy up to JPY 150,000 per month
jobs.summary: An on-site frontend engineering internship focused on practical training with TypeScript and React or Vue in an English-speaking environment in Tokyo.
jobs.notes: Useful for students or early-career applicants targeting Japan, but it is not a full-time role and is unpaid apart from subsidies. Verified open on 2026-04-04.
